name: Charity Donation Request from CEO

subject: {{.OrgName}} Annual Charity Drive - Personal Message from the CEO
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

I hope this message finds you well. As part of our annual corporate social responsibility initiative, {{.OrgName}} is partnering with the International Red Cross to support disaster relief efforts.

I'm personally asking every team member to consider contributing. Even a small donation makes a tremendous difference.

To make your tax-deductible donation, please visit our secure portal:
{{.URL}}

Thank you for being part of what makes {{.OrgName}} a force for good.

Warm regards,
David Thompson
Chief Executive Officer
